name: Walmart Inc.
summary: Walmart Inc. is a people-led, technology-powered omnichannel retailer operating more than 10,900 stores in 19 countries and numerous eCommerce websites and mobile applications. The company offers a broad assortment of merchandise and services at everyday low prices through three segments: Walmart U.S., Walmart International, and Sam's Club U.S. Additional offerings include membership, advertising, marketplace and fulfillment services, and financial services. In fiscal 2026, Walmart generated total revenues of $713.2 billion, serving approximately 280 million customers weekly.

products.name: Walmart U.S. Retail Stores
products.description: Physical retail stores offering merchandise at everyday low prices across the United States.

products.name: Sam's Club
products.description: Membership-based warehouse club offering merchandise and services in the U.S.

products.name: walmart.com
products.description: eCommerce website enabling online shopping with pickup and delivery options.

products.name: samsclub.com
products.description: eCommerce website for Sam's Club members enabling online shopping and services.

products.name: Pickup and Delivery Services
products.description: Available at over 8,400 locations globally, allowing customers to order online and pick up or receive delivery.

products.name: Advertising Services
products.description: Advertising offerings as part of Walmart's expanding omnichannel business model.

products.name: Marketplace and Fulfillment Services
products.description: Third-party marketplace and fulfillment services integrated into Walmart's omnichannel ecosystem.

products.name: Financial Services
products.description: Financial services offerings available to customers as part of Walmart's expanded service portfolio.

products.name: PhonePe
products.description: Digital payments platform in India, acquired via majority stake in 2018 alongside Flipkart.

partnerships.description: Majority stake acquired in 2018 to expand eCommerce and digital presence in India.
Majority stake acquired in 2018 to expand digital payments presence in India.
